nasb.text: The disciples *said to Him, “Where would we get so many loaves in this desolate place to satisfy such a large crowd?”

esv.text: And the disciples said to him, “Where are we to get enough bread in such a desolate place to feed so great a crowd?”

cnv.text: 門徒對他說：“我們在這曠野地方，哪裡有足夠的食物給這許多的人吃飽呢？”

ccb.text: 门徒说：“在这荒野，我们到哪里找足够的食物给这么多人吃呢？”

csbs.text: 门徒们说：“我们在旷野，从哪里得这么多的食物让这么大一群人吃饱呢？”
